name_en: 👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
name_cn:
👑Goyard Saigon Mini - The most practical bag 🥇
🌟Beechwood handle + unique silhouette = unforgettable
🌟Cotton-linen fabric and leather patchwork + yellow calfskin lining = exquisite from the inside out.
🌟Perfect strap length, only 250g! Light enough to make you doubt if it's a bag. This is the unique charm of MiniSaigon.
🌟Suitable for any style and occasion, no need to worry about matching. Absolutely stunning.
🌟All the beautiful colors are shared here. A safe bet, no wrong choices.
 Dimensions 21*14.5*9.5CM
Model 8005
